shakshi: The player accepted Nexiott's mission to enforce new quotas on the Gnomes — only available to players who have not committed against the war
The player destroyed the children's housework in the Gnome quarters
New metal quota notices left on every Gnome door — bureaucratic violence dressed as administration
The act is complete — the task was the task, the game does not comment
The children must redo the housework and meet harder quotas simultaneously — the player caused this directly
The player is now materially inside Nexiott's operation — not adjacent to it, inside it
The Gnomes, children, Joannah, and Sidhal do not know who did it — the player's shop relationships are intact on the surface
The player who holds gnome_crystal_origin_known just oppressed the people whose gift became the weapon — the irony is invisible to everyone including potentially the player
